HR1808.reason: Assault Weapons Ban of 2022 - bans the sale, manufacture, transfer, and importation of semiautomatic assault weapons and large-capacity ammunition feeding devices

HR7910.reason: Protecting Our Kids Act - raises the age to purchase semi-automatic rifles to 21 and includes provisions regulating bump stocks and ghost guns, though not a full assault weapons ban

HJRES44.reason: CRA disapproval of ATF pistol brace rule - voting Yea blocks ATF regulation that would classify pistols with stabilizing braces as short-barreled rifles subject to NFA restrictions, effectively loosening restrictions on these weapons

HR6691.reason: Community Safety and Security Act (115th Congress) - Republican alternative to gun control that focused on mental health and school security rather than weapons restrictions, included concealed carry reciprocity provisions
